narrative:
category_one_description: The school will have two separate campuses for a middle and elementary school in FY2026.  The elementary school location has not been finalized as of this Form 470, but the two potential locations are as follows: Lamad Arverne ELEMENTARY located at either 65 Beach 56th Street, 5th Fl, Queens NY 11692 OR 160 Beach 29 Street, 3rd Fl, Queens NY 11691At least 1 internet line, with a minimum 1 GBPS, dedicated fiber preferred.  Please provide quotes for 1 GB, 2 GB, and 5 GB speeds.  Please provide any NRC setup costs with the quote, which may require a site survey.At least 1 internet line, cable preferred at a minimum 200 MBPSLamad Academy MIDDLE located at 1060 Clarkson Avenue, 4th Floor Brooklyn, NY 11212At least 1 internet line, with a minimum 1 GBPS, dedicated fiber preferred.  Please provide quotes for 1 GB, 2 GB, and 5 GB speeds.  Please provide any NRC setup costs with the quote, which may require a site survey.At least 1 internet line, cable preferred at a minimum 200 MBPS
